name: 8"x10" Wavy Shape Picture Table Frame Black - Room Essentials™
description:
Set up your decor with the 8"x10" Wavy Shape Picture Table Frame Black from Room Essentials™. Featuring a unique wavy rectangular design, this lightweight yet durable frame is perfect for showcasing one memorable photo at a time. With horizontal or vertical display options and a convenient hanging triangle mount, it’s a stylish way to preserve and display your favorite picture.

Room Essentials™: Everyday value.
